title: [phase:plan] [family:approval-tokens] [provider_hint:codex] Current task: openclaw-tmux replacement. Review the new prototype and propose the minimum scoped approval-token model to replace coarse --approve. Return concise bullets: token fields, validation rules, TTL, and how to bind token to action+...
summary_text: - **Root cause:** `resolve-orchestration-context.sh` only uses `ISSUE_NUMBER_FROM_DISPATCH` when `GITHUB_EVENT_NAME=workflow_dispatch`; for `push`, it reads `ISSUE_NUMBER_FROM_ISSUE`, so your current push env leaves `ISSUE_NUMBER` empty. - **Minimal workflow fix (no script changes):** in the `Resolve issue context` step, set `ISSUE_NUMBER_FROM_ISSUE` for push (and optionally mirror both vars to the same forced value), e.g. `ISSUE_NUMBER_FROM_ISSUE: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' && '499' || '' }}` - **Avoid:** trying to force this via `ISSUE_NUMBER_FROM_DISPATCH` alone (or overriding `GITHUB_EVENT_NAME`); push path will still ignore it.
